trigger.Name: PEREGREV_INTER
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_PEREGEV_11" ) TDeactivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_1") TDeactivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_2") TDeactivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_3") TDeactivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_4") TDeactivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_5") TDeactivate("PEREGREVHEALTH") TDeactivate("PEREGREVHEALTH2") TActivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_6")
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: PEREGREV_BOOM_3
trigger.script: god(0) PlayCustomMusic("Passage02") AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_PEREGEV_3" ) TActivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_4") TActivate("PEREGREV_BOOM_5") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: PEREGREVHEALTH
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","- 1") end

trigger.Name: PEREGREVHEALTH2
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","- 1") end

trigger.Name: Timer_BOOM_1
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","- 1") end

trigger.Name: Timer_BOOM_2
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddModifier("hp","- 1") end

trigger.Name: Create_gate
trigger.script:
CreateNewDummyObject( "kef_gate", "VOROTA1", -1, -1, CVector(3730.653, 313.469, 4050.167), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000, -0.0000),1 )
CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot2_rainmetal","dot19", 1024, CVector(3712.722, 314.774, 4026.041), Quaternion(0.000, 0.702, 0.000, 0.712),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot2_rainmetal","dot20", 1024, CVector(3713.212, 313.856, 4074.538), Quaternion(0.000, 0.707, 0.000, 0.707),0 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Kochewnik_active
trigger.script:
CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_3","Koch_1", CVector(2086.163, 282.301, 3861.111), 1064)
local vehKoch1 = GetEntityByName("Koch_1") if vehKoch1 then vehKoch1:SetPosition( CVector(5955.514, 282.070, 1631.042)) vehKoch1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.002, -0.868, 0.002, 0.497)) end
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "FireKoch1", -1, -1, CVector(5930.416, 280.000, 1620.900), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 0.205)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap42
trigger.script:
local FurrrrrryCCC1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar112") if FurrrrrryCCC1 then FurrrrrryCCC1:Remove() end
PassToMap("r4m2", "FromR4M1", -1 )
TActivate("AfterRace_cin") trigger:Deactivate()
